name: Dashboard Starter
description: A React dashboard for fundamentals, five-year trends, company search, statements, and health scoring.
bestFor: Fundamentals dashboards, investor tools, company analysis pages
agentPrompt: Read README.md, AGENTS.md, CUSTOMIZE.md, and WISESHEETS_API.md. Help me customize this Wisesheets dashboard. Keep API keys server-side and use the existing /api/wisesheets proxy.

name: Company Screener
description: A filterable company screener for finding stocks by growth, margin, balance sheet, exchange, and industry.
agentPrompt: Read README.md, AGENTS.md, and WISESHEETS_API.md. Build or customize a Wisesheets screener. Keep API keys server-side and route API calls through /api/wisesheets.

name: Portfolio Tracker
description: A portfolio dashboard that tracks holdings, exposure, company fundamentals, and aggregate portfolio quality.
bestFor: Personal portfolios, client dashboards, monitoring workflows
agentPrompt: Read README.md, AGENTS.md, and WISESHEETS_API.md. Customize this portfolio tracker for my holdings. Keep WISESHEETS_API_KEY server-side.

name: Excel Add-in Starter
description: An Excel add-in starter for Wisesheets-powered spreadsheet workflows and AI-assisted financial analysis.
bestFor: Spreadsheet models, analyst workflows, Excel-native tools
agentPrompt: Read README.md, AGENTS.md, and WISESHEETS_API.md. Customize this Excel add-in for Wisesheets workflows. Keep API credentials out of worksheet-visible code.
